title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming SMS during update
scenario: Incoming SMS does not interrupt or fail Device Firmware Update (DFU) process on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected Poly device.
5. While the DFU is in progress, have a new SMS message sent to the Android device.
6. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app and the connected device during and after the SMS notification.
7. Wait for the DFU to complete.
expected: The Device Firmware Update (DFU) continues running without interruption and completes successfully. The incoming SMS does not cause the update to pause, fail, or abort.
